problems.diagnostic: Source_Data_Size (property association) does not point to anything
problems.cause: Reference to undefined property 'Source_Data_Size' in annex
problems.minimal_edit: Remove or correct undefined property reference 'Source_Data_Size' in the AGREE annex block

executor_steps: Identify the AGREE annex block in the Q component type
Locate the undefined property reference 'Source_Data_Size' within the annex
Remove the invalid property reference or replace it with a valid identifier from the model
